notes: v2.0: expanded from 12 questions + 8 docs to 50 questions + 100 docs.
Question set includes explicit subset tags (global/character) for POV split scoring.
Doc set includes ~28 noise documents to test retrieval precision under distraction.
Sufficient scale to measure heuristic router vs LLM router quality delta.
Sufficient scale to measure LightRAG-enabled vs disabled retrieval gain.
If question set or fixture docs changes, bump dataset_version and record changelog.

changelog.changes: Initial 12 questions + 8 docs with subset tags.
Expanded to 50 questions + 100 docs. Added noise docs. LightRAG set as required dependency.
